channel.title: OH on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in OH on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 287(g) TFM: Clermont County Sheriff’s Office (OH)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Clermont County Sheriff’s Office.

Model: TFM Signed: November 4, 2025 County: Clermont County State: OH FIPS: 39025

Source: Prison Policy Initiative appendix table, compiled from ICE data as of Feb 17, 2026.

item.title: FARBER SPECIALTY VEHICLES, INC — ICE FRANKLIN, OH $530,318
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: FARBER SPECIALTY VEHICLES, INC Award ID: 70CMSD21FC0000043 Amount: $530,318.00 Description: TACTICAL VEHICLES Period: 2021-08-27 to 2022-08-26 Location: FRANKLIN, OH (FIPS: 39049)
